title: AGCUT Screen Replacement for Samsung A40 LCD Display for Samsung Galaxy A40 SM-A405F SM-A405FN SM-A405FM 5.9 Inch Incell LCD Screen Digitizer Assembly with Repair Kit (Black)
features: Precise Compatibility: This replacement screen for Samsung Galaxy A40 models (SM-A405F SM-A405FN SM-A405FM 5.9 Inch). Before purchasing, please check your device model number in “Setting” > “General” > “About Phone”, so as not to cause unnecessary trouble due to model number discrepancy

Superior Quality: Crafted from high-grade materials, Screen replacement for Samsung A40 effectively addresses common issues like cracked glass, distorted display, and unresponsive touch. It restores the phone's original clear visuals and smooth touch functionality, rejuvenating your screen experience

Installation Information: Installation instructions are not included in the package. For guidance, please search YouTube for relevant installation tutorial videos. If you lack screen replacement experience, we strongly recommend seeking assistance from a professional technician to prevent damage to your device during installation

Aftermarket Service: Should you have any questions or encounter problems during the purchase or usage process lcd screen for Galaxy A40, our customer service team is available 24 to assist you. Please note that this replacement screen does not include the power button or volume button supply cable

Package Contents: The package includes 1 LCD display for Samsung A40 and 1 repair toolset. Please be aware that the repair tools may not be suitable for all screen replacement scenarios; refer to the actual situation for compatibility
description: This screen replacement kit is only for Samsung Galaxy A40, Model: SM-A405F SM-A405FN SM-A405FM 5.9 Inch. Please be sure to check your phone model number carefully before placing an order to avoid the impact of the use of the experience due to model discrepancies. If the screen still has problems, please contact us. 2. We can offer you a replacement or refund for quality problems not caused by human factors. Within three months from the date of purchase, you can enjoy free replacement or refund service. 3. Please check the LCD display for Galaxy A40 for quality problems before installation, if there is any problem, please contact us in time, please don't force to install it on your phone.
